# Security Improvement Pull Request

**Summary**

> Describe the security-related change.

**Vulnerability Addressed**

> What risk or vulnerability is being mitigated?

**Impact**

> Describe the expected security benefits.

**Testing**

> How was the security change validated?

**Disclosure**

- [ ] This PR does not publicly disclose an unpatched vulnerability.
- [ ] Sensitive details have been shared privately if required.

Checklist

- [ ] [`CLA`](https://github.com/Teamemories/Foxtension?tab=contributing-ov-file#contributing-to-foxtension) accepted.
- [ ] Security implications reviewed.
- [ ] Change tested.
